new_classes.label_en: Tokaj Wine in Containers of 2 Litres or Less
new_classes.definition_en: Still wine of the Tokaj designation of origin, presented in containers holding 2 litres or less, classified under CN code 22042123 (Chapter 22). Defined by additional note 4(B)(b) to Chapter 22.
A quality characteristic indicating that a wine bears the Tokaj designation of origin as defined by additional note 4(B)(b) to Chapter 22 of the Combined Nomenclature.

coverage_explanation: The legal text for 22042123 is brief: it names the product as "Tokaj" and refers to additional note 4(B)(b) to Chapter 22. The note reference defines the specific conditions for the Tokaj designation of origin (geographic origin, production rules under Hungarian/Slovak PDO law). The axioms capture: (1) subclass of StillWine (non-sparkling, ≤ 2 L container inherited from parent subheading 2204 21), (2) the Tokaj designation of origin quality via hasGeographicOriginQuality, (3) the container volume constraint (≤ 2 L). Coverage is reduced from 1.0 because the precise contents of additional note 4(B)(b) — such as specific alcoholic strength thresholds, grape variety requirements, residual sugar levels, or production area details that further define Tokaj — are not spelled out in the provided legal text and cannot be fully axiomatised without the text of the additional note itself.
